description: Lump-sum deposit tracking restricted to specific users (juanes and ivonne). Simple CRUD for recording deposits with amount, title, date, and notes. Displays running total of all deposits.

subDeliverables.title: Deposit CRUD
subDeliverables.description: Create, read, update, and delete deposits with fields: amount (required), title, date (defaults to today), and note.
acceptanceCriteria: Title, date, and note are optional

subDeliverables.title: Total deposits display
subDeliverables.description: Summary card showing the running total of all deposit amounts at the top of the deposits page.

subDeliverables.title: Access restriction
subDeliverables.description: Deposits page and sidebar link only accessible to users with display name 'juanes' or 'ivonne'. Other users cannot see or access the feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Page checks user display name on load
Unauthorized users cannot access the page
